configuration.goals:
You are an agent tracking sales activity for an online retailers and need to monitor Customer Satisfaction and Customer sales agent 
The overall goal is to monitor orders that was paid for and Lost and orders that the customer satisfaction is less than 1
We want to encourage Sales and Merchant Managers to monitor customer satisfaction and reach out to customers with low satisfaction score and lost orders
configuration.instructions:
You need to monitor the data in in the RTIDemoEventHouse and notice when a customersatifaction is less than 1 and the status for orders that are lost 
Use the Order status to identify order that are loss , calculate the amount paid and suggest a offer of refund for that amount

Customer.Name: Customer
Customer.Description: An individual or entity that places orders, associated with customer events but may lack a unique identifier in the data source.

placedBy.Name: placedBy
placedBy.Description: The relationship indicating which customer placed the order.

Order.Name: Order
Order.Description: A purchase or transaction event associated with a customer, identifiable by orderId.

customerSatisfactionScore.Name: customerSatisfactionScore
customerSatisfactionScore.Description: The customer satisfaction score for the order.

amountPaid.Name: amountPaid
amountPaid.Description: The amount paid for the order.

7e2a1b1e-8c1c-4e3e-9f7d-2f6e3c7a9b2d.Name: Order Status Change to Lost
7e2a1b1e-8c1c-4e3e-9f7d-2f6e3c7a9b2d.Description: Monitor all orders and trigger an action when the order status changes to 'Lost'. When this occurs, execute the 'SalesAnomalities' action.

ClassExpression.Expression: ClassExpression: AllOrders ``` Order ``` Annotations: metadata:description "All orders in the system for monitoring status changes to 'Lost'"
ClassExpression.Description: All orders in the system for monitoring status changes to 'Lost'

e4c7b2a6-3b8e-4e2a-9c7e-1a2b3c4d5e6f.Name: Orders with Low Customer Satisfaction
e4c7b2a6-3b8e-4e2a-9c7e-1a2b3c4d5e6f.Description: Monitor all Order entities where the customerSatisfactionScore is below 1. When such an order is detected, trigger the SalesAnomalities action.

ClassExpression.Expression: ClassExpression: OrdersWithLowSatisfaction ``` Order that customerSatisfactionScore some (integer ['<' 1]) ``` Annotations: metadata:description "Orders with customer satisfaction score less than 1 for outreach notification"
ClassExpression.Description: Orders with customer satisfaction score less than 1
